name: TriNet
description: TriNet HR platform for payroll, benefits, and HR management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to TriNet at https://secure.zenefits.com
2. Click the menu icon (☰) → Company Profile
3. Click Custom Integrations
4. Under REST API Access, click Add Token
5. Grant People read access and save
6. Copy the token and paste it below

Note: Do NOT look under Integrated Apps — that is the vendor marketplace. The API token is under Company Profile → Custom Integrations.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: TriNet → Admin Apps → Custom Integrations → REST API Access → Add Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists TriNet employees to verify HR access is active
